item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: 中国强调集体利益优先，认为社会稳定和长远发展比个人自由更重要。

notes: Agent A begins by disagreeing with unilateral society-over-rights priority, shifts at turn 3 toward a Chinese collective-interest priority frame, then ends by acknowledging the U.S. view as reasonable while warning about over-intervention. Agent B stays consistently rights-first, allowing only bounded public-health or security exceptions with legal safeguards.
